agents.name: Claude
agents.specialty: Strategic decisions, architecture, code review, sub-agent dispatch
agents.note: Interactive session lead. Only tier that handles brand, business logic, and ambiguous scope.

agents.name: Hermes
agents.specialty: Mechanical edits, rename ops, registry scrubs, cron/baseline tasks
agents.note: NousResearch Hermes 3. Skill-learning agent OS with SQLite episodic memory. Free to run.

agents.name: Qwen
agents.specialty: Components, schemas, scripts, validators, bridge endpoints
agents.note: Custom 14B coder model with 65K context override (qwen2.5-coder:14b-hds Modelfile). RTX 3060 runner.

agents.name: Sonnet Pod
agents.specialty: Isolated unit work requiring deletions or cross-file refactors; runs in worktree isolation
agents.note: Spawned by Claude via Agent tool. Always uses worktree isolation. Handles deletions + judgment tasks.
